name: Grilled Scallops and Kale with a Fresh Beet Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 Cups fresh beet juice, see notes
1 1/4 Pounds fresh sea scallops, see notes
1 Pound young kale leaves, core removed
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce: Place beet juice in a non-reactive saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and whisk 2-3 tablespoons of olive oil slowly into the reduction until thickened. Whisk in white wine vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste. Set aside and keep warm.
2. Lightly coat the scallops with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and a few drops of lemon juice. Brush kale leaves with oil and season lightly.
3. Grill kale on both sides until slightly charred and cooked through. Grill scallops until just cooked (center should be slightly opaque).
4. Arrange kale attractively in the center of warm plates. Drizzle a few drops of sherry vinegar over the kale. Place scallops on top and spoon beet sauce around.
5. Garnish with chive sticks and yellow bell pepper. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
